ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mapping_versions" (
  "mapping_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the mapping version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mapping version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping version was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the element (e.g., Class, Object, Primitive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the element belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the element */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the element was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the element was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elements_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., string, int, unsigned long long) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the variable belongs to */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scope the variable belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variable */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the variable was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the variable was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES variable_scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the scope belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scope */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the scope was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the scope was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the scope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_scopes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_scopes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the table belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the table */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the table was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the table was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the column */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the column belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the column */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the column was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the column was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "mapping_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mapping version */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scope */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_mapping_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_version_id") REFERENCES mapping_versions ("mapping_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES variable_scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mappings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_versions" (
  "variable_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable version */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the variable version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the variable version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variable version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the variable version was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the variable version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data lineage entry */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "source_table" TEXT /* Name of the source table */,
  "source_column" TEXT /* Name of the source column */,
  "target_table" TEXT /* Name of the target table */,
  "target_column" TEXT /* Name of the target column */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data lineage entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the data lineage entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the data lineage entry was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the data lineage entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)
